assertions.description: Connectivity correctly shows 0 unrouted nets. Thermal pad via analysis for STM32G431 QFN (9 vias vs recommended 14-22) is a valid real-world finding. DFM tier standard with no violations. CAN/HALL/motor nets correctly appear in net_classes. Tombstoning risk on C20 (0402 with thermal asymmetry) is plausible.
